properties.title: The Obsidian Luxury Villa
properties.description: A gorgeous architectural masterpiece featuring a modern luxury black and white design palette. Features floor-to-ceiling glass walls, an infinity pool, smart automation, and professional chef kitchen.

properties.title: Noir Crest Penthouse
properties.description: A luxury high-rise penthouse showcasing stunning skyline views. Adorned with dark marble, brass accents, private elevator access, and a wrap-around terrace.

properties.title: Vanguard Minimalist Duplex
properties.description: Modern duplex design with a soaring double-height living room. Features concrete rendering, luxury Italian fittings, and a rooftop lounge.

properties.title: Serene Oasis Bungalow
properties.description: A beautifully renovated mid-century modern bungalow. Steps away from the ocean, featuring high wooden beamed ceilings, skylights, and indoor-outdoor living flow.

properties.title: Apex Executive Headquarters
properties.description: State of the art corporate building suitable for tech giants. Massive open plan layouts, fiber-optic backbone, premium conference halls, and private cafeteria.

products.name: Bouclé Accent Lounge Chair
products.description: Luxury upholstered lounge chair in creamy white bouclé fabric, featuring solid oak frame legs. Designed for maximum comfort and premium aesthetic.

products.name: Matte Black Smart Espresso Machine
products.description: Premium bean-to-cup espresso maker. Intelligent touch control, customizable profile settings, and sleek metal chassis to elevate any luxury kitchen.

products.name: Ambient LED Sound Bar Suite
products.description: Immersive Dolby Atmos sound system with integrated customizable smart backlighting. Elegant minimal bar matches perfectly under premium TV mounts.

products.name: Monolithic Ceramic Vase Set
products.description: Handcrafted textured stoneware vases in black, charcoal, and warm grey. Perfect centerpieces for minimalist consoles.

products.name: Damascus Professional Knife Set
products.description: 6-piece chef knife bundle made with 67 layers of Japanese Damascus steel. Includes black walnut magnetic block.

products.name: Smart Biometric Security Door Lock
products.description: Top-tier deadbolt lock with fingerprint scanner, digital keypad, mobile application support, and mechanical keys. Finished in brushed dark obsidian.
